creator: marius@alchemy.franken.de
text:
It's unclear why you build environment needs this but anyway, the
proposed patch will break some other things as overriding the
do-build target with just issuing ./Gmake will no longer set up
the content of MAKE_ENV as environment for gmake, amongst others.
Could you please try whether the attached patch has the same effect
for you?

Marius
